data.title: SmartCentres Announces Filing of Information Circular in Connection with Annual Unitholders’ Meeting
data.description: SmartCentres Real Estate Investment Trust, a Toronto-based trust listed on the TSX under the symbol SRU.UN, has completed the preparation of its management information circular for its upcoming annual unitholders' meeting on May 13, 2026. The agenda includes voting on trustees election, auditor appointment, and an advisory vote on executive compensation. The meeting seeks approval from unitholders regarding these matters.

data.title: Qingming Festival: Conveying Mourning for Ancestors through Chiwen
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Beijing, a recent report highlighted by China.org.cn discusses the arrival of the Qingming Festival amidst the rejuvenating spring season, heralding clear skies and fresh air in the region. The festival is marked by Online Chinese Festivals celebrating with auspicious beasts as a focal point, symbolizing the seasonal transition and traditional festivities. This event showcases the essence of Qingming Festival's observance, presenting a cultural spectacle that resonates with the community, embodying the essence of renewal and celebration.
Australia’s Prime Minister Albanese states that online gambling promotions will only be allowed for logged-in users who are over 18 and can opt out of ads.
Australia’s Prime Minister Albanese says celebrities and sports players will no longer be allowed in gambling ads, and gambling ads will be banned at sports venues.

data.title: HEARTS ON FIRE CELEBRATES 30 YEARS OF BRILLIANCE WITH NEW GLOBAL CAMPAIGN WHAT'S YOUR SIGNATURE?
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Hong Kong, the renowned jewelry brand HEARTS ON FIRE introduced its 30th anniversary campaign titled "What's Your Signature?" This launch highlights the brand's exceptional diamond brilliance and commemorates three decades of excellence in craftsmanship and innovation.
Australia’s Prime Minister Albanese states TV gambling ads will be capped at three per hour between 6 AM and 8:30 PM, with no ads allowed during live sports within those hours.

data.title: Celldex Announces Pricing of $300 Million Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Celldex Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed the pricing of an underwritten public offering, announcing the sale of 10,345,000 shares of common stock at $29.00 per share. The company proposed to sell all these shares, with an option for underwriters to purchase an extra 1,551,750 shares at the same price. The gross proceeds from the offering, expected to be around $300 million before underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses, will be received by the Company. The closing of the offering is anticipated on or around April 6, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.

data.title: Metropolitan Issues Statement on State’s Fourth Snowpack Survey of the Season
data.description: The General Manager of Metropolitan Water District, Shivaji Deshmukh, commented on the California Department of Water Resources’ fourth snow survey, stating that the Northern Sierra revealed a poor snowpack due to fluctuating weather patterns this winter. The snow levels were significantly reduced by last month's unusually high temperatures, erasing the early-season snow accumulation. This situation highlights the importance of investments in storage, conservation, and diverse water supplies to address the challenges posed by changing weather conditions.
